title: Principal audit post-ticket-286 checkpoint
problem: Three consecutive done tickets (284–286) since principal audit post-ticket-283. Cadence gate blocks ticket-287 until a read-only principal audit checkpoint resets the counter and confirms release health.
acceptance_criteria: Principal audit report written with cadence status, mock golden gate results, and GO/NO-GO for ticket-287.
Read-only checkpoint — no ticket-287 implementation in the same run.
Cadence counter reset documented for tickets 284–286 window.
